title: Schizoph
description: Schizoph adds cryptic and creepy mobs
body:
Schizoph is a mod that aims to add several useful artifacts and Monsters that can be found in forests or caves.
This Mod requieres GeckoLib
Use JEI for recipes

Data:

# Entities

Cave Slug/Cave Larva is a creature that lives in dripstone caves, when right clicked with salt, It will dead and drop Slug Slime, this Slime can be useful in the mod.

Cave Slug also can be breed with sugar.

 

Observer is a Big Bird that is aggresive against players or animals type mobs, like pigs or cows. This mob lives in Snowy biomes like Snowy Taiga or Snowy Tundra, also, when is going to attack something he put up his arms and run against the creature.

When right clicked with a Knife it will dead and drop his Beak, that can be used for Blue Sacrifice Ink.

When right clicked with a Butcher Knife will make the Observer dead and drop his two foots, It can be used to Craft Red Sacrifice Ink.

Sheriff Skeleton is a old man that have a Spine Whip, and can attack you from far away than other mobs. This entity can spawn in Lush Caves.

When dead, the sheriff skeleton have chances to drop you bones and spines, the spines are used for Spine Whip.

Jester is a little rascal that can kill you if he want. This little zombie when dead will summon a Time Bomb, wich can be deactivated or destroyed to get it.

The jester has a little chance to drop his Hat, that is a very useful tool for poison effects.

This enemy can Spawn in swamps in his own structures.

 

Giant Slug is a slug consumed by the Salt, can be summoned eating a Rotten Carrot. When dead, it will drop some Giant Spikes, and Slug, also, Salt.

Howlter, a big owl-like entity with big claws. Spawns rarely in giant taiga forests. Its a peaceful critter, that will not attack players, and if necessary, It will use his large claws to kill fastly the player. The Howlter also its scared of foxes. When right clicked using shears will drop his nails.

Jungle Slug, a small slug entity that generates slug slime in his current position. Not very usefull. Can be seen in any jungle biome.

# Items & Blocks

Blue Altar - is a useful artifact, when right clicked with a Knife the player will receive the Bleeding effect, but when right clicked with a Blue Sacrifice Knife it will drop Two Flesh items and make Bleeding the player.

Also, when right clicked with lapis It will replace It with redstone.

When placed near a villager, the villager will Take the work named "Schizo"

Red Altar - is similar to blue altar, but, instead of making Flesh, It makes Salt, and also replaces the redstone to lapis.

This Altar doesnt have a villager profesion.

Rock Bell - can be used to summon a Observer if you dont want to locate him (Only 1.19.4)

Spine Whip - is a tool that can be used for giving bleeding to the enemy, it is made of Spines from sheriff skeletons and skull shards, that can be created using any skull in the stonecutter

Jester Hat - when equiped will give the player the Fun effect

Time Bomb - explodes after 5 seconds, but can be deactivated using sciccors

Slug Slime Block - will make the player can't jump (Only 1.19.4)

Golden Sickle - used for attack, a faster with no much duration. (Only 1.19.4)

Netherite Machete - The Netherite Machete is not so usefull right now, but can be used to attack. (Only 1.19.4)

Rotten Carrot - This rotten vegetable can be used to summon the Giant Slug by eaten it.

Giant Slug Slime - This Giant Slug Slime can be used for some things as Blocks or Bombs.

Giant Slug Spike - Used for the Bombs.

Giant Slug Block - When right clicked with Scissors it drops Slug Slime. (Mechanic only in 1.19.4)

Giant Nail - can be obtained using shears in a Howlter.

Nail Sickle - can be created using giant nails, when attacked a entity with this tool will give the player regeneration for a few seconds.

Howlter Steak - when eated It will grant mining fatigue.

Cooked Howlter Steak - when eated It will grant resistance II and slowness II for a few minutes.

Nail Carver - A multitool crafteable with giant nails and red slug slime.

Sticky Bomb - A bomb that makes the entity hit sticky.

Jungle Slug Slime - Just some gross slug slime. When walk through it makes the player go faster and also makes you unable to jump.

## Altar Tutorial
### (Only 1.20.1)
Slot 1 = Top Slot

Slot 2 = Under Slot

### Red Altar
When used a Red Sacrifice Knife in Slot 1, it will damage and give the player 4 Flesh.

When used a Carrot in Slot 1 and Red Sacrifice Ink in Slot 2 will give rotten carrot.

When used Only Red Sacrifice Ink in Slot 2 will give 16 red dye.

### Blue Altar
When used a Blue Sacrifice Knife in Slot 1 will give Flesh.

When used Blue Sacrifice Ink in Slot 2 will give Salt.
# Effects

Bleeding is a effect that make the player get damaged.

Fun is a effect, that when applied, it will remove the poison effect and replace it with strenght, also, will replace resistance with a bad effect
 
## Questions

Q: This mod will be ported to Fabric or Quilt?

A: No, because of the work of updating two or more versions of the same mod.

 

Q: This can be used in a modpack?

A: Of course.

 

Q: Will this be backported to other versions?

A: No.

 

Q: This will be updated?

A: Yeah, i think so

 

Join the Discord of the mod for Bugs Reports or speak to a community
